arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Sheffield United after double injury boost
arts.sum: "It’s always tricky during the international break for a team with so many players away," Farke when asked about the injury problems at Elland Road. Normally both teams want to be at their best, Friday evening is a bit disappointing, we know about the schedule list and for that no complaints.

arts.ttl: Is Leeds United vs Sheffield United on TV? Kick-off time, live stream details and how to follow
arts.sum: Leeds United can send a statement to their promotion rivals when they face Sheffield United at Elland Road on Friday night. The match will be broadcast live on the Sky Sports Football channel, with coverage getting underway at 19.30pm.

arts.ttl: Leeds United legends and Leeds Rhinos hero Kevin Sinfield help open new White Rose Shopping Centre store
arts.sum: Leeds Rhinos hero Kevin Sinfield and some former Leeds United stars helped open a new fashion store at the White Rose Shopping Centre. Leading UK menswear brand, Skopes, has opened its flagship store at White Rose Shopping Centre marking a homecoming for the Leeds brand.

arts.ttl: Leeds boss issues emphatic response to surprising Jurgen Klopp link
arts.sum: Leeds United boss Daniel Farke is unconcerned by Jurgen Klopps new role as Red Bull's Head of Soccer and is adamant that his side retain autonomy despite their new investors

arts.ttl: 'Unbelievable Leeds Star Open to Elland Road Exit in January
arts.sum: Real Betis are plotting a move for Leeds United defender Junior Firpo in January.

arts.ttl: Wilder pays tribute to former Blades defender Baldock
arts.sum: Sheffield United manager Chris Wilder says George Baldock "meant so much to everybody" as he pays tribute to the former Blades defender following his shock death last week.

arts.ttl: James returns, Gnonto 10: Leeds United predicted XI to face Sheffield United
arts.sum: Leeds United face Sheffield United on Friday night in an early-season promotion face-off against Chris Wilder’s unbeaten side. Manor Solomon and Dan James have been out of the Leeds squad in recent weeks due to respective hamstring trouble – James last featuring in August against Sheffield Wednesday where he scored, Solomon in the loss to Burnley.

arts.ttl: Leeds eyeing move for former Arsenal midfielder with two FA Cup titles; player is open to a move
arts.sum: Former Arsenal star Francis Coquelin could be set for a return to England with Championship side Leeds United. That is according to the latest report from The Sun, who claim that the Yorkshire club are considering offering the midfielder a short-term deal at Elland Road. Coquelin joined Arsenal as a youngster in 2008 from Stade […] The post Leeds eyeing move for former Arsenal midfielder with two FA Cup titles; player is open to a move appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chris Wilder makes Leeds United and Aston Villa claim as Sheffield United anticipation stoked up
arts.sum: Whether attempting to ease the pressure on his side and lower expectations or not ahead of the sides meeting at Elland Road, Wilder took the opportunity before the match to highlight the different standing of the two clubs. Leeds host the Blades at Elland Road on Friday night in a match-up between two sides with aspirations of promotion, with Wilder's team looking to make an immediate return to the Premier League and Leeds hoping to do it at the second attempt.

arts.ttl: Leeds United line-up vs Sheff Utd has two changes and Aaronson verdict
arts.sum: Firpo and Tanaka were expected to land in the UK during the early hours of Wednesday morning, while Aaronson could have been as late as Wednesday evening. Manor Solomon and Daniel James's return to team training last week is another reason to take it easy with Aaronson.
